title: AI Service Request — Canonical internal input
description: Normalized shape after the Bridge (or adapter) maps the ingress envelope (see request-dto.schema.json) to a flat session/run state. Aligns with architecture §5.1 AIServiceRequest. Values here are merged with PlanStep.parameters for each step (parameters override on key collision).

message.description: The user's natural language message (also exposed as session_state['message'] for agent runs).

request_id.description: Runtime correlation ID for this AI run (same as bridge request_id).

role.description: User role (e.g. end_user, technician, admin, or tenant-specific roles such as service_desk_agent).

locale.description: BCP 47 language preference; Bridge SHOULD set; defaults to en when omitted by producer.

ticket_id.description: Ticket the user is currently viewing in UI context.

request_id_ref.description: ITSM service request record reference when distinct from AI request_id.

conversation_history.description: Prior turns in this session. Bridge SHOULD populate when available (required for accurate UC-4 sentiment across the thread).
